lines.reason: Bakerloo Line: Service will resume later this morning.
Circle Line: Service will resume later this morning.

DISTRICT LINE: Saturday 11 and Sunday 12 July, no service between Turnham Green and Ealing Broadway. Replacement bus services operate: Service PL3 operates between Hammersmith and Osterley via Turnham Green (Chiswick High Road), Chiswick Park, Gunnersbury, Acton Town, Ealing Common, Ealing Broadway, South Ealing, Northfields and Boston Manor. Service PL4: Gunnersbury (for District line) - Acton Town - Ealing Common - North Ealing - Hanger Lane (for Central line and Park Royal) - Alperton (Bridgewater Road) - Sudbury Town (Whitton Avenue East) - Sudbury Hill - South Harrow - Rayners Lane;
Minor delays between Whitechapel and Shenfield due to emergency engineering work following a lineside fire at Stratford on Friday. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.

METROPOLITAN LINE: Saturday 11 and Sunday 12 July, no service between Harrow-on-the-Hill and Uxbridge. There will also be no PICCADILLY LINE service between Hammersmith and Uxbridge. Replacement bus service ML1 operates between Harrow-on-the-Hill and Uxbridge via West Harrow (Treve Avenue), Rayners Lane, Eastcote, Ruislip Manor, Ruislip, West Ruislip (for Central line and Chiltern Railways), Ickenham and Hillingdon.

Mildmay Line: No service between Willesden Junction and Richmond due to a fault with the overhead power lines at Acton Central. Tickets are being accepted on London Underground. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.

PICCADILLY LINE: Saturday 11, from 0045, and all day Sunday 12 July, no service between Hammersmith and Heathrow (all terminals) / Uxbridge. The METROPOLITAN LINE will also be suspended between Harrow-on-the-Hill and Uxbridge. Use HEATHROW EXPRESS and ELIZABETH LINE for transfers between Heathrow terminals. Replacement bus services operate.
Waterloo & City line: service operates 06:00 until 00:30, Monday to Friday only. There is no service on Saturdays, Sundays and on bank/public holidays.
